admin.title: Interlockings
admin.subtitle: Catalogue of interlockings in the system. Assign interlockings to layouts from the layout editor.

delete.title: Delete interlocking "{{name}}"
delete.message: This operation is irreversible. The interlocking will be removed from every layout it was assigned to.

fields.name: Name
fields.locationHelp: A short description of where or what the interlocking covers.

admin.empty: There are no interlockings to display.

view.signalmanOnlyHint: Only signalmen of this layout can occupy or leave the interlocking.
view.radioComingSoon: Radio panel will be available together with the takeover flow in the next milestone.

displace.title: Interlocking already staffed
displace.message: This interlocking is currently staffed by {{login}}. Do you want to displace them and take over?

leaveGuard.title: Leave the interlocking?
leaveGuard.message: You are staffing this interlocking. If you continue, your signalman session here will end.

view.displacedToast: Another signalman has displaced you from this interlocking.
